div.h1: Pre-LN vs Post-LN: Gradient Highway Comparison

p.em: Why normalization placement determines training stability in deep transformers

div.p: Important: Pre-LN requires a final LayerNorm after the last layer, since the output hasn't been normalized. Post-LN's last sublayer already includes normalization.

p.em: Identity term I provides GRADIENT HIGHWAY
Even if Sublayer gradient vanishes, I remains

ul.li: Can achieve slightly better final performance
Used in: GPT-2, GPT-3, LLaMA, BERT-large
